tipRules.tip: Johnston: Drop shot a finesse worm to target bedding bass in spring runs and backwater areas off main lakes in Florida.
Johnston: Flip various worms and creature baits to bed fish in spring runs off the main lake. Use Garmin Perspective Mode and Power-Pole Move trolling motor for precise presentations.
Johnston: When the bed fish pattern starts dwindling, switch to flipping spatterdock (pads) on the main river for big bites including 7+ pounders.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: At the St. Johns River, always look for spawning bass. You can always catch one or two big spawners and fill out a big limit.
Johnston: When your main bed fish pattern dwindles on the final day, make the adjustment to flip pads on the main river. Managing fish well and making good decisions is key.
Johnston: Rely heavily on Garmin Perspective Mode for locating and targeting bed fish in Florida spring runs.
